title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
